name: Ammortamento Prestito
description: Calcola la rata mensile e gli interessi totali di un prestito.
seo_description: Calcola la rata mensile e gli interessi totali di un prestito. Calcolatore gratuito, preciso e istantaneo. Calcolatrice facile da usare con dettaglio.
example_label: Calcolating monthly payment for $250,000 mortgage at 4.5% over 30 years.
result_context: The payment of {payment} is your monthly mortgage payment. The total_interest of {total_interest} is paid over the loan life.
mistakes: Not accounting for property taxes and insurance in totale payment
Paying only minimum without considering extra principale payments
Refinancing without calculating break-even point on closing costs
